[2317-honhai-fy2025-margins-eps] Hon Hai reported FY2025 gross margin of 6.15%, operating margin of 3.20%, net margin of 2.34%, and EPS of NT$13.61.

evidence_summary: [claim_id: 2421-20260507-003] yfinance 快篩資料顯示：Forward P/E 約 12.3、Trailing P/E 約 18.6、Revenue Growth 約 +27.5%、Gross Margin 約 31.1%、Operating Margin 約 16.5%。
[claim_id: 2421-20260507-001; derived_calculation] 以 20,000 TWD、146–147 附近試算，可買約 135–136 股，含手續費約 19,862–19,873 TWD；僅為 point-in-time sizing context，非 Current Facts 決策依據。
risk_summary: 散熱零組件可能被 ODM / CSP cost down。
若營收沒有跟上 AI 散熱敘事，估值重評會失敗。
盤中波動大，追高容易買在情緒點。
液冷 / 高階散熱若涉及可靠度與賠償風險，需查公司實際曝險。

risk_summary: Position sizing method: risk-budget-derived, not desired-allocation-first.
For 50,000 TWD test capital and entry near NT$4,200 / stop NT$3,650:
medium risk 3% allows 2 shares, allocation NT$8,400, max loss NT$1,100.
high risk 5% allows 4 shares, allocation NT$16,800, max loss NT$2,200, requires user risk tolerance confirmation.

companies.research_summary: Important boundary: official partnership announcements confirm relationship and planned deployment scope; they do not by themselves confirm revenue timing, margin, cash collection, or customer credit quality.
evidence_summary: [nvda-refresh-20260509-fy2026-revenue] NVIDIA reported FY2026 revenue of $215.938bn, up 65% YoY, for the fiscal year ended 2026-01-25.
[nvda-refresh-20260509-q4-fy2026-revenue] NVIDIA reported Q4 FY2026 revenue of $68.127bn, up 20% QoQ and 73% YoY.
[nvda-refresh-20260509-q4-gross-margin-eps] Q4 FY2026 GAAP gross margin was 75.0%, non-GAAP gross margin was 75.2%, and GAAP diluted EPS was $1.76.
[nvda-refresh-20260509-fy2026-data-center] Data Center revenue was $62.3bn in Q4 FY2026, up 22% QoQ and 75% YoY; full-year Data Center revenue was $193.7bn, up 68%.
[nvda-refresh-20260509-q1-fy2027-outlook] NVIDIA guided Q1 FY2027 revenue to $78.0bn +/- 2%, with no assumed Data Center compute revenue from China in the outlook.

evidence_summary: [vrt-refresh-20260508-business-critical-digital-infrastructure] FY2025 Form 10-K describes Vertiv as a global leader in critical digital infrastructure technology that powers, cools, deploys, secures and maintains electronics that process, store and transmit data.

[vrt-refresh-20260508-products-power-thermal-liquid-cooling] FY2025 Form 10-K lists offerings including AC/DC power management, thermal management, liquid-cooled thermal products, switchgear, busbar, integrated modular solutions, UPS, rack power distribution, energy storage, software and services.

[vrt-refresh-20260508-applications-ai-data-center] FY2025 Form 10-K states Vertiv offerings support applications including AI across data centers, communication networks and commercial / industrial environments.
[vrt-refresh-20260508-reportable-segments] Vertiv reportable segments are Americas, Asia Pacific, and Europe / Middle East & Africa.
[vrt-refresh-20260508-fy2025-sales-geography] FY2025 net sales were $10.2299bn; 62% Americas, 20% APAC, 18% EMEA.
